title: Arcanist's Equipage
description: Addon to Iron's Spells & Spellbooks mod adding more equipment and weapons. (Formerly Elementus: Arcane)
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dea45265fd4368f3876619b70ae4c1946aa8e1e8.png)

(Formerly Elementus: Arcane)

Adds items to Iron's Spells & Spellbooks

# ⚠️Development Paused till December⚠️

Current additions:

### Tools / Weapons:
- **Arcane Iron Claymore**
  - Stats
    - 7 Attack Damage
    - 1 Attack Speed


- **Arcanium Claymore**
  - Stats
    - 9 Attack Damage
    - 1 Attack Speed
    - 5% Mana Regen


- **Arcanium Hammer**
  - Stats
    - 6 Attack Damage
    - 1 Attack Speed
    - 15% Cast Time Reduction
  - Imbued: Spectral Hammer level 2


### Armor Sets:
- **Adventurer Armor set**
  - Stats:
    - Armor: ( helmet 1, chestplate 5, leggins 3, boots 1)
    - Attack speed: 2.5% (10% total)
    - Max Health: 12.5% (50% total)
    - Max Mana: 75 (300 total)
    - Cast time Reduction: 5% (20% total)


- **Shade Armor set**
  - Stats:
    - Armor: ( helmet 2, chestplate 6, leggins 4, boots 2)
    - Ender Spell Power: 2% (8% total)
    - Blodd Spell Power: 2$ (8% total)
    - Max Mana: 75 (300 total)
    - Cooldown Reduction: 5% (20% total)



- **Dune Armor set**
  - Stats:
    - Armor: ( helmet 2, chestplate 6, leggins 4, boots 2)
    - Fire Spell Power: 2% (8% total)
    - Lightning Spell Power: 2$ (8% total)
    - Max Mana: 75 (300 total)
    - Cooldown Reduction: 5% (20% total)


- **Paladin Armor set**
  - Stats:
    - Armor: ( helmet 3, chestplate 8, leggins 6, boots 3)
    - Toughness: 2 (8 total)
    - Knockback Resistance: 1 (4 total)
    - Max Mana: 100 (400 total)
    - Holy Spell Power: 4% per piece (16% total)
